suggestions.title: Add quantifiable achievements to experience section
suggestions.why: Quantified achievements demonstrate measurable results and provide concrete evidence of your contributions, making you more attractive to employers and ATS systems
suggestions.exampleRewrite: "Increased sales by 25% within 6 months" instead of "Responsible for sales activities"
suggestions.copyPrompt: Rewrite experience bullets to include specific metrics and measurable outcomes

suggestions.title: Include more technical keywords
suggestions.why: ATS systems and recruiters often filter resumes based on specific keywords related to the job. Adding relevant technical terms improves chances of passing automated screening
suggestions.exampleRewrite: Add industry-specific terms like "Agile methodology," "CI/CD pipelines," "cloud infrastructure" based on job requirements
suggestions.copyPrompt: Identify key technical terms from job descriptions and incorporate them naturally throughout the resume

suggestions.title: Remove graphics that may obscure text
suggestions.why: Excessive graphics can interfere with ATS parsing and may distract from content. Clean, simple formatting is preferred by most employers
suggestions.exampleRewrite: Replace infographic elements with clean, text-based sections
suggestions.copyPrompt: Simplify visual elements to ensure compatibility with ATS systems and improve readability

suggestions.title: Add more specific action verbs
suggestions.why: Strong, specific action verbs make your experience more dynamic and demonstrate leadership and initiative, helping you stand out from other candidates
suggestions.exampleRewrite: " Spearheaded cross-functional team to implement new CRM system" instead of "Worked on CRM implementation"
suggestions.copyPrompt: Replace passive language and weak verbs with powerful action words like 'spearheaded,' 'orchestrated,' 'optimized,' etc.

suggestions.title: Standardize section headings
suggestions.why: Consistent formatting makes your resume look professional and easier to navigate. Standard headings also help ATS systems parse your resume correctly
suggestions.exampleRewrite: Use standard headings like "Work Experience," "Education," "Skills" rather than creative alternatives
suggestions.copyPrompt: Ensure all section headings follow a consistent format and use industry-standard terminology
